prose:
Water frontier-orbital (HOMO–LUMO gap) calculation — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied water.xyz, single-point calculation (not relaxed). SCF converged in 7 cycles; integrity trustworthy. Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV. HOMO energy = −8.6037183 eV; LUMO energy = +0.33695037 eV. Koopmans vertical ionization potential = 8.6037 eV; vertical electron affinity = −0.3370 eV (unbound anion in gas phase). Total electronic energy = −2080.6615 eV (−76.462901 Hartree). Command: `frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 water.xyz`. Result schema v1 passed all integrity checks.</prose>
